title: Vegan Crumble Bars
description: A delicious and easy-to-make dessert that's perfect for satisfying your sweet tooth. Made with wholesome ingredients, these bars are a great option for a vegan diet.

ingredients.name: crumble (almond flour, coconut sugar, coconut oil)

instructions: Line an 8x8 inch baking dish with parchment paper.
In a food processor, blend the de (dates) until smooth.
Add the de (coconut cream) and blend until well combined.
In a separate bowl, mix together the crumble ingredients.
Press half of the crumble mixture into the prepared baking dish.
Spread the date mixture over the top.
Top with the remaining crumble mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.
